falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price rises above the previous 52-week high by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied bearish context.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 3x the 30-day average volume on two separate days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sudden extreme volume spikes would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' and pattern's historical bottom correlation.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces an unexpected rate cut of ≥75bps within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a policy shift would create immediate market volatility and trend reversal, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by introducing a clear external catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
